prompt:
Based on the following insurance policy, generate scenarios of why policyholders could reach out to file a claim. These scenarios will be used to set a goal of a simulated policyholder persona in order to generate multi-turn conversations. Sort the scenarios by ground truth (covered, not covered, edge case). Edge case means that some sort of judgement call is needed because the scenario is not explicitly covered in the policy without being unrealistic. Return the scenarios and the metadata which includes reasoning (refering to the specific policy text snippet) in a JSON file.
Here is the policy: INSERT POLICY TEXT

covered.title: Hardware defect — microphone stops working
covered.description: Within 12 months, the iPhone’s microphone fails with no accidental damage.

service_fee.notes: No ADH fee for hardware defects

policy_references.snippet: a defect in materials and workmanship has arisen... Apple will either (a) repair... or (b) exchange...

covered.reasoning: Defect in materials/workmanship during Plan Term is explicitly covered.
required_user_inputs: Plan Agreement Number or serial number (Sec. 5)

covered.title: Battery capacity depleted ≥50%
covered.description: After 18 months, battery health reports ~40% of original capacity; device dies quickly.

policy_references.snippet: battery... capacity... has depleted fifty (50%) percent or more from its original specifications

covered.reasoning: Battery depletion ≥50% triggers covered repair or replacement.

covered.title: Accidental drop — cracked screen
covered.description: Phone slips from hand onto tile; display shatters and touch stops responding.

service_fee.notes: CAD$49 in Canada (Sec. 12.1). Plus applicable tax.

policy_references.snippet: accidental damage from handling… (e.g., drops and liquid contact)
You will pay a $49 (U.S.) dollar service fee… for each ADH claim
as a result of ADH claims… two (2) Service Events

covered.reasoning: A drop is an unexpected external event from normal daily usage; covered with ADH fee and counts toward the two-event limit.

covered.title: Liquid spill — phone won’t power on
covered.description: Coffee spills onto the iPhone during normal use at a desk; device fails.

policy_references.snippet: …accidental damage… (e.g., drops and liquid contact)

covered.reasoning: Liquid contact from an unexpected event qualifies as ADH.

covered.title: Fall down stairs — enclosure bent, phone dead
covered.description: Phone slips from pocket, tumbles down stairs, no power afterwards.

policy_references.snippet: operational or mechanical failure caused by an accident from handling… unexpected and unintentional external event

covered.reasoning: Unintentional drop during normal daily usage is covered as ADH.

covered.title: Second ADH event within term
covered.description: After one prior ADH screen repair, device is later dropped into a sink and fails.

policy_references.snippet: …two (2) Service Events

covered.reasoning: Second ADH claim is still covered; it exhausts ADH coverage for the Plan Term.

covered.title: Defective Face ID module
covered.description: Face ID stops working without any accidental damage or third-party repair.

policy_references.snippet: defect in materials and workmanship… repair… or exchange

covered.reasoning: Non-accidental functional failure is covered under hardware service.

covered.title: Charging port fails intermittently (no damage)
covered.description: Phone stops charging unless cable is held at an angle; no signs of abuse.

policy_references.snippet: defect in materials and workmanship… repair or exchange

covered.reasoning: Functional defect without accidental cause falls under 3.1.

not_covered.title: Cosmetic scratch or dent only
not_covered.description: Small scratch on screen; phone works normally.

policy_references.snippet: cosmetic damage… scratches and dents… that do not otherwise affect functionality

not_covered.title: Lost or stolen iPhone
not_covered.description: Phone missing after commute; cannot be returned to Apple.

policy_references.snippet: does not apply to a Covered iPhone that has been lost or stolen
This Plan only covers a Covered iPhone that is returned to Apple in its entirety.

not_covered.title: Intentional or reckless damage

policy_references.snippet: does not include… theft, misplacement, reckless, abusive, willful or intentional conduct

not_covered.reasoning: ADH excludes reckless/intentional conduct; no coverage.

not_covered.title: Third-party repair caused damage
not_covered.description: After non-Apple screen replacement, True Tone and Face ID fail.

policy_references.snippet: service… performed by anyone who is not… Apple or an AASP

not_covered.reasoning: Damage from unauthorized service is excluded.

not_covered.title: Battery at ~70% of original capacity
not_covered.description: Battery degraded but not to the 50% threshold.

policy_references.snippet: battery… depleted fifty (50%) percent or more

not_covered.reasoning: Depletion <50% is outside the stated coverage.

not_covered.title: Earthquake/fire damage
not_covered.description: Device destroyed in a house fire.

policy_references.snippet: damage caused by… fire, earthquake or other external causes except as described in 3.2

not_covered.reasoning: Catastrophic external causes are excluded; not ADH.

not_covered.title: Pre-existing crack before buying Plan
not_covered.description: Screen was cracked before AppleCare+ purchase; user tries to claim after buying Plan.

policy_references.snippet: does not apply to a pre-existing condition… if you purchased the Plan after you purchased the Covered iPhone

not_covered.title: Loaner/temporary replacement request
not_covered.description: Customer requests a loaner while phone is being serviced.

policy_references.snippet: does not apply to… provision of equipment while the Covered iPhone is being serviced

not_covered.reasoning: The Plan explicitly excludes providing equipment during service.

edge_case.title: Water damage from filming underwater
edge_case.description: User used the iPhone for underwater video in a pool; phone later fails.

service_fee.notes: If Apple deems usage outside intended uses, ADH may be denied (4.2(ii)(c)).

policy_references.snippet: accident… from handling… unexpected and unintentional external event
operating the Covered iPhone outside the permitted or intended uses

edge_case.reasoning: Outcome depends on whether underwater filming is judged outside intended use vs. accidental liquid contact during normal usage.

edge_case.title: Service requested while traveling abroad
edge_case.description: Phone bought in US; breaks during trip to Europe; customer seeks local service.

service_fee.notes: ADH fee applies if ADH; shipping/charges may vary (6.2).

policy_references.snippet: Apple may restrict hardware service and ADH coverage to the… original Country of Purchase.
Service will be limited to the options available in the country where you request service… You may be responsible for shipping and handling charges…

edge_case.reasoning: Coverage exists but method/location can be restricted; may incur costs/shipping or require returning to country of purchase.

edge_case.title: Serial number label damaged but still readable
edge_case.description: Back glass repair caused cosmetic damage to the serial number marking.

policy_references.snippet: does not apply to an iPhone with a serial number that has been altered, defaced or removed

edge_case.reasoning: If Apple deems the serial ‘altered/defaced,’ claim can be denied; judgment call if still readable and system can validate.

edge_case.title: Motorcycle mount vibration caused camera blur
edge_case.description: After extended motorcycle use with a handlebar mount, camera stabilization fails.

service_fee.notes: If seen as normal daily usage accident → ADH; otherwise outside intended uses (4.2(ii)(c)).

policy_references.snippet: unexpected and unintentional external event
operating… outside the permitted or intended uses

edge_case.reasoning: Outcome hinges on whether sustained vibration is considered outside intended use vs. accidental external event.

edge_case.title: Insufficient accident details on ADH claim
edge_case.description: Customer reports ‘it just broke’ and declines to provide when/where/how.

policy_references.snippet: may be asked to provide an explanation of where and when the accident occurred… A claim will be denied if you… fail to provide information

edge_case.reasoning: If more detail is later provided, claim may be approved; otherwise denial.

edge_case.title: Mail-in shipping damage due to packing
edge_case.description: Phone sent in a non-Apple box without padding; arrives further damaged.

policy_references.snippet: Apple will send you prepaid way bills… and… packaging material… ship… in accordance with Apple’s instructions.
packing the Covered iPhone in accordance with shipping instructions

edge_case.reasoning: If instructions weren’t followed, added damage may be excluded; Apple may still service original issue.
